LANDING.TITLE: Prepare for your interviews with artificial intelligence
LANDING.SUBTITLE: HireVision AI analyzes your CV, measures your compatibility with job offers, and helps you improve your interview performance through smart feedback.
LANDING.WHY_SUBTITLE: Practice under real-life conditions to eliminate stress and succeed in your recruitments.
LANDING.TRADITIONAL_1: Sending CVs without knowing if skills match real expectations.
LANDING.TRADITIONAL_3: No objective feedback on weaknesses and communication style.
LANDING.TRADITIONAL_4: High stress levels on the interview day.
LANDING.METHOD_1: Instant compatibility analysis and key skill gap detection.
LANDING.METHOD_2: Adaptive mock interviews modeled after real hiring questions.
LANDING.METHOD_3: Smart feedback on speech rate, tone of voice, and body posture.
LANDING.METHOD_4: Targeted learning path to make rapid progress.
LANDING.FEAT_SUBTITLE: A set of smart tools to accelerate your preparation.
LANDING.FEAT_CV_DESC: Import your resume in PDF format and let our AI extract key skills.
LANDING.FEAT_MATCH_DESC: Compare your CV with job postings to find matching skills.
LANDING.FEAT_INT_DESC: Answer live technical and behavioral questions adapted to your profile.
LANDING.FEAT_FEEDBACK_DESC: Get instant evaluations on your speech rate, clarity, and posture.
LANDING.FEAT_ROADMAP_DESC: Follow a custom week-by-week study plan tailored for you.
LANDING.FEAT_GAME_DESC: Gain experience points, level up, and unlock achievements.
LANDING.STEP_SUBTITLE: Five simple steps to go from candidate to employee.
LANDING.STEP_1_D: Upload your resume in a few clicks to get started.
LANDING.STEP_2_D: The AI extracts your skills and draws your radar chart.
LANDING.STEP_3_D: Choose a position and measure your matching score.
LANDING.STEP_4_D: Practice using our video/microphone simulator tool.
LANDING.STEP_5_D: Visualize your progress scores and work on your roadmap.
LANDING.STAT_TIME: to analyze your CV and detect target skills
LANDING.STAT_RECOMMEND: of users recommend our smart AI coaching
LANDING.CTA_SUBTITLE: Sign up today and start practicing for free.
